name: Mae Moh Golf Course
source_notes: EGAT Mae Moh golf course at the Mae Moh Power Plant compound, Mae Moh district, Lampang province. Mae Moh is EGAT's largest coal-fired power station in Thailand, with a large self-contained township for several thousand employees. EGAT townships of this scale consistently include 18-hole golf courses open to the public at government rates (pattern confirmed: Ubolratana Dam Khon Kaen, Rajjaprabha Dam Surat Thani, Bhumibol Dam Tak). 18H/par-72 assumed per EGAT standard but not confirmed from a direct source. Green fees unknown — likely in the 300–700 THB range per EGAT pattern. Phone number not found. Mae Moh is approximately 80 km southwest of Lampang city.
